technology.title: China’s AI start-up funding triples to US$16b in first quarter amid bets on LLMs, robotics
technology.summary: Funding for China’s artificial-intelligence-related start-ups jumped nearly threefold year on year in the first quarter, as investors poured capital into large language models (LLMs) and embodied AI amid growing optimism over the country’s technology ecosystem. AI-related start-ups secured more than 110 billion yuan (US$16.2 billion) in the first three months of the year, representing a 185 per cent surge from the same period last year, according to data released on Thursday by Beijing-based...

briefing.news_focus: Funding for China’s artificial-intelligence-related start-ups jumped nearly threefold year on year in the first quarter, as investors poured capital into large language models (LLMs) and embodied AI amid growing optimism over the country’s technology ecosystem. AI-related start-ups secured more than 110 billion yuan (US$16.2 billion) in the first three months of the year, representing a 185 per cent surge from the same period last year, according to data released on Thursday by Beijing-based...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國的人工智慧初創企業在2023年第一季度的資金籌集達到162億美元，較去年同期增長185%。這一增長主要受到投資者對大型語言模型（LLMs）和具身人工智慧的樂觀情緒推動。根據北京發布的數據，這些企業在短短三個月內獲得了超過1100億元人民幣的投資，顯示出中國科技生態系統的強勁回暖。
briefing.background: 近年來，中國在人工智慧領域的發展迅速，政府的政策支持和市場需求驅動了相關技術的創新和應用。特別是在大型語言模型和機器人技術方面，中國企業積極追趕全球領先水平。隨著數字經濟的蓬勃發展，AI技術被視為提升產業效率和競爭力的關鍵因素，吸引了大量資本進入這一領域。投資者對於中國AI初創企業的信心逐漸增強，反映出市場對未來增長潛力的期待。
briefing.analysis: 此次資金激增顯示出中國在人工智慧領域的投資熱潮，尤其是大型語言模型和具身AI的興起，可能會改變未來的技術格局。投資者的信心反映了對中國科技生態系統的樂觀預期，這可能會吸引更多國內外資本進一步投入。然而，這也可能引發市場競爭的加劇，特別是在全球科技競爭日益激烈的背景下。各方利益關係中，初創企業希望借助資金加速技術研發，而投資者則期望通過投資獲得高回報。未來，這一領域的發展將受到政策、技術進步及市場需求的多重影響。

technology.title: China is losing the LLM race but it can still win in AI, ex-Tencent AI lead says
technology.summary: For years, Liu Wei was synonymous with Chinese tech giant Tencent Holdings’ artificial intelligence efforts. A distinguished scientist at the Shenzhen-based company, Liu was also head of its Hunyuan team, the firm’s foundational model development unit for the generative AI era. But in late 2024, Liu’s departure from Tencent after more than eight years sparked immediate speculation as to why he left. Hunyuan was introduced only a year earlier – so why did Liu suddenly quit one of China’s most...

briefing.news_focus: For years, Liu Wei was synonymous with Chinese tech giant Tencent Holdings’ artificial intelligence efforts. A distinguished scientist at the Shenzhen-based company, Liu was also head of its Hunyuan team, the firm’s foundational model development unit for the generative AI era. But in late 2024, Liu’s departure from Tencent after more than eight years sparked immediate speculation as to why he left. Hunyuan was introduced only a year earlier – so why did Liu suddenly quit one of China’s most...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國科技巨頭騰訊的人工智慧領導者劉偉在2024年底離開公司，這一消息引發了外界對其離職原因的猜測。劉偉曾是騰訊Hunyuan團隊的負責人，該團隊專注於生成式AI的基礎模型開發，並於一年前成立。劉偉的離職時機引人關注，因為Hunyuan團隊剛剛起步，這使得人們對中國在大型語言模型（LLM）競爭中的地位產生疑問。
briefing.background: 中國在人工智慧領域的發展迅速，尤其是在生成式AI和大型語言模型方面。隨著全球對AI技術的需求上升，中國企業如騰訊、阿里巴巴和百度等積極投入資源以提升其技術能力。然而，中國在LLM競賽中面臨來自美國科技公司的強大競爭，這些公司在技術創新和市場佔有率上佔據優勢。劉偉的離職可能反映出騰訊在這一競爭中的挑戰與壓力，特別是在吸引和留住人才方面。
briefing.analysis: 劉偉的離職引發了對騰訊未來AI戰略的廣泛討論。作為Hunyuan團隊的創始人，劉偉的離開可能會影響該團隊的穩定性和發展方向。業內人士可能會關注騰訊如何應對人才流失及其在AI領域的競爭策略。儘管劉偉指出中國在LLM競賽中處於劣勢，但他仍然認為中國在AI領域有機會取得成功，這表明他對中國AI未來的信心。這一觀點可能會影響投資者和市場對中國AI產業的看法，尤其是在人才流動和技術創新方面。

technology.title: Met Palantir row goes to heart of how public services should use AI
technology.summary: UK’s largest police force says Palantir is only company that can supply what it needs. But is it worth the controversy that comes with it? London mayor Sadiq Khan blocks £50m Met police deal with Palantir It’s bot v bobby. The row over whether the controversial US AI company Palantir should be paid £50m to help the Metropolitan police goes to the heart of how public services will be delivered in the coming years. A similar dynamic is playing out in hospitals, schools and town halls, but right now police chiefs are turning to AI to escape a fiscal bind. The UK’s largest police force is shrinking; a £125m funding shortfall means it faces cutting 1,150 posts. Scotland Yard wants to use AI to deploy Palantir’s systems to comb through human intelligence reports, email caches, phone records and the rest of the torrent of digital evidence trail left by 21st century crime. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: UK’s largest police force says Palantir is only company that can supply what it needs. But is it worth the controversy that comes with it? London mayor Sadiq Khan blocks £50m Met police deal with Palantir It’s bot v bobby. The row over whether the controversial US AI company Palantir should be paid £50m to help the Metropolitan police goes to the heart of how public services will be delivered in the coming years. The UK’s largest police force is shrinking; a £125m funding shortfall means it faces cutting 1,150 posts. Scotland Yard wants to use AI to deploy Palantir’s systems to comb through human intelligence reports, email caches, phone records and the rest of the torrent of digital evidence trail left by 21st century crime. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國倫敦市長薩迪克·汗（Sadiq Khan）阻止了倫敦警察局與美國人工智慧公司Palantir簽訂價值5000萬英鎊的合約。這一爭議引發了對公共服務如何使用人工智慧的廣泛討論。倫敦警察局面臨125萬英鎊的資金短缺，迫切需要利用AI技術來處理大量的數位證據，以應對21世紀的犯罪挑戰。
briefing.background: 隨著公共服務面臨預算壓力，英國各地的警察部門、醫院和學校都在考慮如何有效利用人工智慧來提升服務效率。倫敦警察局作為英國最大的警察部隊，正面臨人力資源的縮減，計劃裁減1150個職位。Palantir作為一家專注於數據分析的公司，提供的技術被認為能夠幫助警方更好地分析和處理來自各種來源的數據，然而其過去的爭議性也引發了公眾的擔憂。
briefing.analysis: 倫敦市長的決定反映了對Palantir的爭議性及其在公共服務中角色的質疑。支持者認為，Palantir的技術能有效提升警方的工作效率，幫助他們在資金短缺的情況下更好地打擊犯罪。然而，反對者則擔心這樣的合作可能會侵犯公民隱私，並對公共信任造成損害。此事件凸顯了在資金壓力與技術創新之間的矛盾，未來可能會影響其他公共服務部門的決策，尤其是在資金有限的情況下如何選擇合作夥伴。

politics.title: Friday briefing: ​As Israel’s coalition collapses, can its prime minister hang on to power?
politics.summary: In today’s newsletter: As ​the polls tighten a​​round Benjamin Netanyahu, the coming months may redefine Israel’s political order without resolving its most entrenched conflicts Good morning. On Wednesday, Israeli legislators took the first steps towards dissolving parliament and calling fresh nationwide elections. Leading leftwing Knesset member Yair Golan hailed it “the beginning of the end of the worst government in Israel’s history.” Benjamin Netanyahu has spent 20 of the last 30 years as Israel’s prime minister, the last four of which have seen him helm a far-right coalition. Under the incumbent government, settlement building in the illegally occupied West Bank has accelerated, while many international humanitarian NGOs have been banned from the Palestinian territories. Following Hamas’s killing of 1,200 Israelis on 7 October 2023, Netanyahu has orchestrated a campaign of violence in Gaza, killing or injuring more than 10% of the population , and flattening the strip in what a UN commission has declared a genocide . Netanyahu remains on trial for three counts of corruption. UK news | The parents of a girl critically injured in the Southport attack were allowed no more than 12 counselling sessions after the atrocity, while others described a “woeful” lack of support. UK politics | Sadiq Khan has blocked a £50m Metropolitan police deal with the controversial US tech company Palantir, sparking a bitter row between the London mayor and Scotland Yard. Israel | Israel has said it has deported all the foreign activists it seized from a Gaza-bound flotilla, after a global outcry over their treatment in custody. UK news | Single-sex toilets and changing rooms in England, Wales and Scotland must exclude transgender men and women , according to a new code of practice from the equalities watchdog. Ukraine | Ukrainian drones hit the Syzran oil refinery more than 800km inside Russia, setting it on fire, Volodymyr Zelenskyy said on Thursday. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus_zh: 以色列立法機構於周三開始解散國會並呼籲舉行全國新選舉，這標誌著本內圖·內塔尼亞胡政府的潰敗。反對派成員耶爾·戈蘭表示，這是以色列歷史上最糟糕政府的終結開始。內塔尼亞胡在過去的四年中領導一個極右聯盟，並在加沙地帶發動暴力行動，造成大量平民傷亡，面臨國際譴責及腐敗指控。
briefing.background: 內塔尼亞胡在過去三十年中擔任以色列總理的二十年中，最近四年以極右聯盟執政，該政府的政策包括加速在被佔領的約旦河西岸建立定居點，並禁止多個國際人道NGO進入巴勒斯坦地區。近期，哈馬斯襲擊以色列造成1200人死亡後，內塔尼亞胡的政府展開了對加沙的攻擊，聯合國已將此行為定性為種族滅絕。這一系列事件使得以色列的政治局勢愈加緊張，民眾對政府的不滿情緒上升。
briefing.analysis: 內塔尼亞胡的政府面臨著來自反對派的強烈壓力，尤其是在國會解散的背景下，未來幾個月可能會重新定義以色列的政治格局。反對派的崛起可能會改變目前的執政聯盟結構，並挑戰內塔尼亞胡的領導地位。此外，參考報導中提到的對加沙地帶活動人士的驅逐，顯示出以色列政府在國際壓力下的應對措施，這可能會進一步影響國際社會對以色列的看法。不同報導指出，BBC強調了以色列極右部長對活動人士的嘲諷，引發的國際譴責，而SCMP則著重於活動人士在被拘留期間的虐待經歷，顯示出以色列在處理國際抗議活動中的困境。

supporting_titles: Gaza flotilla activists deported from Israel as backlash over treatment grows
Israel deports hundreds of Gaza flotilla activists as arrivals recount abuse
supporting_summaries: A video showing a far-right Israeli minister taunting activists who were kneeling with their hands tied behind their backs has been widely condemned.

Israel said on Thursday it had deported all the foreign activists seized by its forces from a Gaza-bound flotilla, as the first group arrived in Turkey following global outcry over their treatment in custody. Hundreds of activists from countries around the world were placed in detention in Israel after they were intercepted at sea Monday while making the latest in a string of attempts to break the blockade of the Palestinian territory. Turkish foreign ministry sources said 422 activists,...

politics.title: China Foreign Minister to chair UN Security Council meeting in U.S., visit Canada
politics.summary: Beijing has said Xi ‌Jinping is expected to pay a state visit to the U.S. in the ​fall

briefing.news_focus: Beijing has said Xi ‌Jinping is expected to pay a state visit to the U.S. in the ​fall
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國外交部長將於美國主持聯合國安全理事會會議，並計劃訪問加拿大。此外，北京方面表示，中國國家主席習近平預計將於秋季對美國進行國事訪問。
briefing.background: 此次會議的舉行背景與當前國際局勢密切相關，特別是中美之間的外交關係。隨著全球政治經濟形勢的變化，中國在國際舞台上的影響力逐漸增強，並積極參與聯合國的事務。習近平的國事訪問則可能是雙方尋求改善關係的信號，尤其是在貿易、氣候變化及地緣政治等議題上。
briefing.analysis: 此次中國外交部長主持聯合國安全理事會會議的舉動，顯示中國在國際事務中的主導地位日益增強。中美之間的關係在過去幾年中經歷了多次波動，習近平的國事訪問可能是雙方緩解緊張局勢、尋求合作的契機。然而，考慮到美國對中國在南海及人權等問題的立場，雙方在會議中可能仍會面臨意見分歧。這次會議及習近平的訪問將成為觀察中美外交走向的重要指標，並可能影響未來的國際合作與競爭格局。

politics.title: Rubio says Cuba is threat to US as Havana accuses him of 'lies'
politics.summary: Cuba's foreign minister accused Rubio of trying to "instigate a military aggression".

briefing.news_focus: Cuba's foreign minister accused Rubio of trying to "instigate a military aggression".
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國參議員馬可·魯比奧（Marco Rubio）指控古巴對美國構成國家安全威脅，並表示古巴可能引發軍事行動。古巴外交部長隨後反駁，指責魯比奧試圖「煽動軍事侵略」，並稱其言論為謊言。
briefing.background: 古巴與美國的關係歷來緊張，特別是在古巴革命後的冷戰時期。近年來，儘管曾有過和解的努力，但雙方在政治、經濟及人權等議題上仍存在重大分歧。魯比奧的言論反映了美國政府對古巴的安全評估，尤其是在古巴可能與其他國家（如中國或俄羅斯）建立更緊密的聯繫的背景下。此時，美國正面臨多重國際挑戰，古巴的動向被視為影響美國安全的重要因素。
briefing.analysis: 魯比奧的言論可能旨在強化美國對古巴的警覺性，並為未來的政策調整鋪路。古巴方面則強烈反對這一指控，認為這是對其主權的侵犯，並可能引發國際社會的譴責。參考報導指出，美國國務卿也重申了古巴的威脅，這表明美國政府內部對古巴的安全評估存在共識。然而，古巴的反應顯示出其對美國可能採取軍事行動的擔憂，並可能促使古巴在外交上尋求更多支持。未來，雙方的緊張關係可能進一步升級，特別是在美國內部政治環境變化的情況下。

supporting_titles: US raises threat of military action against Cuba
supporting_summaries: Secretary of State Marco Rubio says Cuba poses a national security threat.

economy.title: UK borrows more than forecast in April as inflation adds to benefits bill
economy.summary: The £24.3bn figure comes amid rising cost of pensions as bond market jitters take monthly debt interest to £10.3bn Business live – latest updates The UK borrowed more than expected in April as high inflation drove up the cost of pensions and benefits, amid concern over the Iran war and political uncertainty adding to debt costs. The Office for National Statistics (ONS) said public sector net borrowing – the difference between government spending and income – was £24.3bn in April 2026, £4.9bn higher than in April 2025. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: The £24.3bn figure comes amid rising cost of pensions as bond market jitters take monthly debt interest to £10.3bn Business live – latest updates The UK borrowed more than expected in April as high inflation drove up the cost of pensions and benefits, amid concern over the Iran war and political uncertainty adding to debt costs. The Office for National Statistics (ONS) said public sector net borrowing – the difference between government spending and income – was £24.3bn in April 2026, £4.9bn higher than in April 2025. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國在2026年4月的公共部門淨借貸達到243億英鎊，超出預期的49億英鎊。這一增長主要是由於高通脹推高了養老金和福利支出，並且受到伊朗戰爭及政治不確定性影響，導致債務成本上升。根據英國國家統計局（ONS）的數據，這一情況反映了政府支出與收入之間的差距。
briefing.background: 當前英國面臨高通脹和不穩定的經濟環境，這使得政府的借貸需求上升。隨著養老金和福利支出增加，公共部門的財政壓力加大。根據參考報導，債券市場的波動使得政府的借貸成本受到影響，這可能會進一步加劇財政狀況的惡化。高通脹不僅影響了消費者的購買力，也使得政府在應對社會福利支出時面臨更大的挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 英國政府的借貸增加反映了當前經濟狀況的複雜性。高通脹推動了福利支出的上升，而政治不確定性則進一步加重了市場對政府財政策略的擔憂。根據《經濟學人》的報導，債券市場的借貸成本正受到通脹與經濟衰退的拉鋸戰影響，這可能會導致未來的借貸成本上升。不同報導的重點在於，《經濟學人》強調了市場動態對借貸成本的影響，而《衛報》則更專注於具體的借貸數據和其背後的社會經濟因素。這些因素將影響英國未來的財政策略及經濟復甦的路徑。

supporting_titles: Inflation or recession? The tug of war in bond markets
Martin Rowson on the spiralling cost of HS2 – cartoon
supporting_summaries: Governments’ borrowing costs are being pulled in opposite directions

economy.title: Hengli, China's silk-to-petrochemicals empire, faces the chill of US sanctions - Reuters
economy.summary: Hengli, China's silk-to-petrochemicals empire, faces the chill of US sanctions Reuters

briefing.news_focus: Hengli, China's silk-to-petrochemicals empire, faces the chill of US sanctions Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國的亨利集團（Hengli）在絲綢到石化產品的產業鏈中佔有重要地位，然而，該公司目前正面臨美國制裁的挑戰。這些制裁可能對其業務運營及未來發展造成重大影響，特別是在全球供應鏈日益緊張的背景下。
briefing.background: 亨利集團成立於1994年，最初專注於絲綢生產，隨後逐步擴展至石化行業，成為中國最大的聚酯生產商之一。隨著全球對環保和可持續發展的重視，亨利集團的業務模式也受到關注。美國對中國企業的制裁政策在近年來日益加劇，特別是在科技和能源領域，這使得亨利集團面臨更大的市場風險和不確定性。
briefing.analysis: 亨利集團的面臨的美國制裁可能會導致其在國際市場上的競爭力下降，尤其是在與美國及其盟友的貿易中。這些制裁不僅影響亨利的供應鏈，也可能對其資金流動性造成壓力，進而影響其擴張計劃。此外，這一情況可能引發中國政府對於保護本土企業的政策調整，進一步加劇中美之間的經濟緊張關係。亨利集團的未來發展將取決於其如何應對這些制裁以及全球市場的變化。

economy.title: UK borrowing hits higher-than-expected £24.3bn in April; retail sales drop as drivers cut back on fuel - business live
economy.summary: Rolling coverage of the latest economic and financial news Oil is on the up this morning. Brent crude, the international benchmark for oil prices, has risen by 3.3% to $105.92 a barrel. Kathleen Brooks , of the broker XTB , says the market is still holding out hope that there will be a resolution to the war in the Middle East. The market continues to think that a deal between the US and Iran is likely, even if we have had mixed messages from both sides. The US has said that a deal is near, but Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon, whereas, Iran has said that it wants to keep its uranium stores. From a trading perspective, it is best to ignore the noise and rhetoric from both sides and concentrate on the numbers. Lower oil prices and bond yields can keep stocks supported in the short term, even if the longer-term outlook depends on the full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. Today’s decision gives European farmers better access to affordable, reliable fertiliser supplies – good news for the agriculture sector and EU consumers alike. At the same time, we are accelerating away from Russian and Belarusian products and building more resilient supply chains and partnerships globally. Continue reading...

Kathleen Brooks , of the broker XTB , says the market is still holding out hope that there will be a resolution to the war in the Middle East. The market continues to think that a deal between the US and Iran is likely, even if we have had mixed messages from both sides. briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國四月的借貸達到預期以上的243億英鎊，顯示出政府財政狀況的壓力。同時，零售銷售因為駕駛者減少燃料消費而出現下滑。市場對於中東戰爭的解決仍抱有希望，油價上漲至每桶105.92美元，顯示出市場對於供應鏈的關注。
briefing.background: 英國的經濟在面臨多重挑戰，包括通貨膨脹和供應鏈問題。隨著全球油價上升，英國的食品價格也隨之上漲，這使得消費者的購買力受到影響。根據BBC的報導，超市在食品價格上漲的情況下，可能獲利增加，這引發了對於市場公平性的討論。此外，地緣政治因素如中東戰爭也影響了貿易和供應鏈，特別是對於汽車等出口產品。
briefing.analysis: 英國政府面臨的高借貸問題可能會影響其未來的財政策略，尤其是在應對通脹和經濟增長方面。根據BBC的報導，超市在食品價格上漲中獲利的情況引發了消費者的不滿，可能導致政府對食品價格的監管加強。另一方面，根據路透社的報導，日本對中東的汽車出口因為戰爭而大幅下降，顯示出地緣政治對貿易的直接影響。這些因素共同作用，可能會導致英國和其他國家的經濟前景變得更加不確定，尤其是在全球供應鏈重組的背景下。
